appraisal_events.evidence: « Pourtant, elle [Albertine] finit par se plier… C’est Françoise qui lui imposa ces règles. »; « Elle était de ces domestiques de Combray sachant la valeur de leur maître… »
appraisal_events.explanation: Françoise is presented as the domestic authority who imposes order and knows what is proper, which locally raises her as a guardian of rules and proprieties.

status_effects.explanation: She gains a position of authority in the house by setting and imposing rules on Albertine, validated by the narrator’s praise.
